mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_executor ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_executor (executor_name, executor_type, executor_desc, connection_type, connection_config, health_check_command, status, is_favorite, favorite_order, group_name, sort_order) VALUES (#{executorName}, #{executorType}, #{executorDesc}, #{connectionType}, #{connectionConfig}, #{healthCheckCommand}, #{status}, #{isFavorite}, #{favoriteOrder}, #{groupName}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_executor SET executor_name = #{executorName}, executor_type = #{executorType}, executor_desc = #{executorDesc}, connection_type = #{connectionType}, connection_config = #{connectionConfig}, health_check_command = #{healthCheckCommand}, status = #{status}, is_favorite = #{isFavorite}, favorite_order = #{favoriteOrder}, group_name = #{groupName}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
